stem:
Sara opened a savings account at a bank. The table shows the exponential relationship between the time t, in years, since Sara opened the account and the total amount d, in dollars, in the account.

Time (years)Total amount (dollars)
0540.00
1545.94
2551.94

If Sara made no additional deposits or withdrawals, which of the following equations best represents the relationship between t and d?
rationale: Choice A is correct. An exponential growth model has the form d = a(1 + r)t, where a is the initial value and r is the periodic growth rate. From the table, a = 540. The growth rate is (545.94 - 540)/540 = 5.94/540 = 0.011 = 1.1%. So d = 540(1.011)t. Choices B, C, and D do not correctly model exponential growth from this initial value.
